_instructions: Manual key_fbref overrides applied after each identity load (load_identity.py). Use when the Reep register has a wrong FBref ID. Set key_fbref to null to fall back to position-based prior. Run etl/audits/audit_player_data.py to discover new cases.

reep_p7a3ab4b8._reason: Reep register links to fbref_id=dbe19468 which belongs to a South American 'Promise David' playing CONMEBOL qualifying. Canada's Promise David has no usable FBref link.

reep_pab166a78._reason: Reep register links to fbref_id=540a5be1 which contains WC 2026 Qual CONMEBOL rows (Canada does not play CONMEBOL qualifying). Cross-contamination with a CONMEBOL player of the same name.

reep_p3c5a20aa._reason: Reep register links to fbref_id=44cfc681 which contains WC 2026 Qual CONMEBOL rows (200 min, 2g) mixed with legitimate Canada data. The CONMEBOL rows inflate his prior to 7.717 — clearly from a different player.
